query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "liveedit: towards real-time diffusion-based streaming video editing" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same domain (zero-shot video editing using diffusion models) and mechanism (attention mask control) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing foundational work on the specific technical components (attention masks) that the user's proposed "LiveEdit" follow-up would likely build upon or compare against.
